name: El Charro Frijoles Refritos (Refried Beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the beans in a skillet and add hot oil. Mix well.
2. Stir in the evaporated milk.
3. Cook over very low heat, stirring frequently.
4. Before serving, refry the beans by adding 2 tablespoons of smoking hot fat, shredded cheese to taste, and some Salsa. Stir briskly over high heat.
